headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 3, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees secured a 9-4 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Cody Bellinger leading the Yankees' offense with 4 hits, 2 home runs, and 4 RBIs. The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Minnesota Twins, securing an 11-4 victory. The Cleveland Guardians routed the Athletics in a high-scoring game, securing a 14-6 victory.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Yusei Kikuchi (Los Angeles Angels) and Ronny Mauricio (New York Mets), who have been placed on the injured list. Other players affected by injuries include Germán Márquez (San Diego Padres), Ronald Acuña Jr. (Atlanta Braves), Will Wilson (Seattle Mariners), Cole Sands (Minnesota Twins), Matt Brash (Seattle Mariners), and Ryan Helsley (Baltimore Orioles).

The Detroit Tigers acquired Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in a trade, while the Toronto Blue Jays traded Tyler Fitzgerald to the Los Angeles Dodgers and Willie MacIver to the Texas Rangers. The Seattle Mariners traded Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for Ty Cummings.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 9-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 9-4 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Ryan Weathers earning the win after 5.0 innings of work. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 4 hits, 2 home runs, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Blast Past Twins 11-4**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Minnesota Twins, securing an 11-4 victory. Brandon Valenzuela led the Blue Jays' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks suffered a 0-2 loss to the Chicago Cubs, with Ian Happ leading the Cubs' offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 1 RBI. Shota Imanaga earned the win for the Cubs, pitching 7.0 innings with 5 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Cleveland Guardians Rout Athletics 14-6**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians dominated the Athletics in a high-scoring game, securing a 14-6 victory. Shea Langeliers led the Athletics' offense with 3 hits, including 2 home runs and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins Edge Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured a 4-3 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Kazuma Okamoto and Vladimir Guerrero Jr. leading the charge for their respective teams. Trey Yesavage was a standout on the mound for the Twins, while Luke Keaschall and Matt Wallner also made notable contributions for the Blue Jays.

top_news.title: **Astros Take Down Red Sox 3-1**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a 3-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox in their recent matchup. Christian Walker and Cam Smith had notable performances for the Red Sox, while Christian Vázquez and Jarren Duran also made an impact.

top_news.title: **Kikuchi Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels left-hander Yusei Kikuchi has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation, with the move retroactive to April 30, 2026.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have acquired infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash.
